definitions.text: One more further, in addition to the quantity by then; a second or additional one, similar in likeness or in effect.
examples: Yes, I'd like another slice of cake, thanks.
Do you know another way to do this job?

definitions.text: Any or some other, similar in likeness or in effect, instead.
examples: One gold ingot is valued the same as another, but gemstones are valued individually.

definitions.text: An additional one of the same kind.
examples: This napkin fell to the floor, could you please bring me another?
There is one sterling and here is another

definitions.text: One that is different from the current one.
examples: I saw one movie, but I think I will see another.
I've thought about moving to another city at one time or another.

definitions.text: One of a group of things of the same kind.
examples: His interests keep shifting from one thing to another.
